title: The Firefly
writer: Frances Goodrich, Albert Hackett, Otto A. Harbach
actors: Jeanette MacDonald, Allan Jones, Warren William
plot: Nina Maria Azara is the beautiful, alluring singing spy for Spain during the Napoleonic Wars. Her mission is to seduce French Officers so they will reveal Napolean's intentions toward Spain. She is sent to Bayonne, France to gathe...
